name: China Gold International Resources Corp. Ltd.
description: China Gold International Resources Corp. Ltd. is a Canadian-listed gold and base metals producer that operates two producing mines in China: the CSH Gold Mine in Inner Mongolia and the Jiama Copper-Gold Polymetallic Mine in Tibet. The company serves as the sole overseas investment vehicle of China National Gold Group Corporation (CNG), the largest gold producer in China. It is a mid-tier producer at the production stage.
